---
title: "AE Explorer report example"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{AE Explorer report example}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(collapse = TRUE, comment = "#>")
```

This article shows the first `gsm.safety` AE Explorer report artifact. The report
is intentionally static for now: it validates mapped AE inputs and summarizes
adverse events by preferred term and body system. The workflow shape matches the
`workr` report pattern used by GSM packages.

```{r}
lSpec <- list(
  Mapped_SUBJ = list(subjid = list(type = "character")),
  Mapped_AE = list(
    subjid = list(type = "character"),
    mdrpt_nsv = list(type = "character"),
    mdrsoc_nsv = list(type = "character")
  )
)

lData <- gsm.safety::MakeAeExplorerExampleData()
lSettings <- gsm.safety::MakeAeExplorerSettings(lSpec)
lManifest <- gsm.safety::MakeAeExplorerManifest(
  lData = lData,
  lSettings = lSettings,
  lMeta = list(Type = "Report", ID = "ae_explorer", Output = "html")
)

lReport <- gsm.safety::Report_AE_Explorer(
  lData = lData,
  lSettings = lSettings,
  lManifest = lManifest,
  strOutputDir = tempdir(),
  strOutputFile = "ae_explorer_example"
)

lReport$path
```

The generated HTML report is embedded below as a pkgdown example preview.

```{r, results = "asis", echo = FALSE}
cat(lReport$html)
```
